VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct model is a real, publicly available model hosted at the exact URL cited (https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct), released by the Alibaba Qwen Team. This is a non-academic software/model release cited as a Hugging Face model page, not a paper, so the absence from academic databases is expected and does not indicate fabrication.
LINK: https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct
